plugins.name: code-review
plugins.description: Extremely strict maintainability review for abstraction quality, file size, and spaghetti-condition growth

plugins.name: security-review
plugins.description: Security-focused code review for injection, authentication, data exposure, and supply-chain risks

plugins.name: performance-review
plugins.description: Identify performance regressions, slow code paths, and resource waste in your changes

plugins.name: testing
plugins.description: Review test coverage, quality, and gaps across your changes

plugins.name: documentation
plugins.description: Review documentation quality, accuracy, and completeness for your changes

plugins.name: system-design
plugins.description: Architectural review covering module boundaries, coupling, scalability, and design clarity
